zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Osbourne Knight於1488年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Sir John Richard Osborne20歲，母親Lady Wilhelmina Richards23歲。他於1510年之前與Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1581年8月11日在英國肯特阿福德享年93歲，埋葬在英國肯特阿福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Osbourne Knight于1488年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Sir John Richard Osborne20岁，母亲Lady Wilhelmina Richards23岁。他于1510年之前与Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1581年8月11日在英国肯特阿福德享年93岁，埋葬在英国肯特阿福德。

nameMeanings.name: Osbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Osborne
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Osbern, partly from late Old English Ōsbern, an Anglicized form of Old Norse Ásbiǫrn (from áss ‘god’ + biǫrn ‘bear’), but more usually from Norman use of the cognate ancient Germanic Ōsbern. Osbern was often treated as an alternative form of Osbert. For pet forms see Hoskin and Opie . The surname has also been established in Ireland (Waterford, Tipperary) since the mid 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Osbourne Knight was born in 1488, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Richard Osborne, was 20 and his mother, Lady Wilhelmina Richards, was 23. He married Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford before 1510, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 11 August 1581, in Ashford, Kent, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Ashford, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Osbourne Knight est né en 1488, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Richard Osborne, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Wilhelmina Richards, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford avant 1510, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 11 août 1581, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Osbourne Knight 1488 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Richard Osborne 20 und seine Mutter Lady Wilhelmina Richards 23. Er hat vor 1510 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. August 1581 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England und wurde in Ashford, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Osbourne Knight è nato il nel 1488 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Richard Osborne, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Wilhelmina Richards, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford prima del 1510, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 11 agosto 1581, nel Ashford, Kent, England, all'età di 93 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashford, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Osbourne Knightが1488年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir John Richard Osborneは20歳，母Lady Wilhelmina Richardsは23歳であった。1510年以前にイギリスイギリスケントでLady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1581年8月11日にイギリスケントアシュフォードで93歳で死去し，イギリスケントアシュフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Osbourne Knight(이)가 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Richard Osborne(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Wilhelmina Richards(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1510년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1581년 8월 11일 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Osbourne Knight nasceu em 1488, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Richard Osborne, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Wilhelmina Richards, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford antes 1510, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 11 de agosto de 1581, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 93 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Osbourne Knight родился в 1488 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Richard Osborne было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Wilhelmina Richards, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford перед 1510 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 11 августа 1581 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Osbourne Knight nació en 1488, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Richard Osborne, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Wilhelmina Richards, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Elisabeth Flydane Duchess of Ashford antes de 1510, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 11 de agosto de 1581, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 93 años, y fue sepultado en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra.
